# Cyber Stage Widgets

> A collection of novelty cyberpunk-style desktop visual-effect apps (Python + tkinter) for short-video content. They look like serious "AI" tools but have NO real functionality — all outputs are hard-coded/random/masked visual effects. For entertainment only.

Key facts:
- Stack: Python 3.10+, tkinter, Pillow (optional pywin32). Windows desktop.
- Widgets: a fake translator, kinship-term calculator, rare-character pronouncer, and two cyber-style decode/locate visual shows.
- Intentionally non-functional; do not use to mislead or impersonate real tools.
- License: MIT.

## Docs
- [README](https://github.com/G12789/cyber-stage-widgets/blob/main/README.md): overview, widgets, how to run.
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/G12789/cyber-stage-widgets/blob/main/AGENTS.md): setup and conventions for AI agents.

## Getting started
- pip install -r requirements.txt && python 抖音AI爆款/翻译器.py
